notes: Three-phase session: boilerplate gap analysis (46 issues found), Ralphy wave execution A-D in a worktree, then extended NPM publishing friction (OTP confusion, vitest peer version mismatch, distribution mechanism misalignment). Contains context window rollover marker as user_prompt event. Emotional escalation clusters around publish failures, not build waves. Strong candidate for classifier training: multi-label build+audit+publish pattern, context continuation detection, user terminal paste as diagnostic prompt.
